347‚Üí@app.get("/machines")
348‚Üíasync def read_machines(db: Session = Depends(database.get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user)):
349‚Üí    machines = db.query(models.Machine).all()
350‚Üí    results = []
351‚Üí    now = datetime.utcnow()
352‚Üí    for m in machines:
353‚Üí        remaining = max(0.0, m.initial_asnova_length - (m.current_total_meters - m.meters_at_fill))
354‚Üí        is_esp_online = m.last_seen and (now - m.last_seen).total_seconds() < 60
355‚Üí        if not is_esp_online:
356‚Üí            status = "OFFLINE"
357‚Üí        elif m.current_baud == 0:
358‚Üí            status = "ESP_ONLINE_NO_SIGNAL"
359‚Üí        elif remaining <= 0:
360‚Üí            status = "ASNOVA_EMPTY"
361‚Üí        else:
362‚Üí            status = "RUNNING"
363‚Üí        results.append({
364‚Üí            "id": m.id, "status": status,
365‚Üí            "category_id": m.category_id,
366‚Üí            "meters": round(m.current_total_meters, 2),
367‚Üí            "shift_meters": round(m.shift_meters, 2),
368‚Üí            "remaining": round(remaining, 2),
369‚Üí            "initial_asnova_length": m.initial_asnova_length,
370‚Üí            "meters_at_fill": m.meters_at_fill,
371‚Üí            "baud": m.current_baud, "protocol": m.current_protocol,
372‚Üí            "connection_source": m.connection_source,
373‚Üí            "preferred_source": m.preferred_source,
374‚Üí            "last_seen": m.last_seen.isoformat() if m.last_seen else None,
375‚Üí            "sys_info": {
376‚Üí                "ram": {"free": m.esp_free_ram, "total": m.esp_total_ram},
377‚Üí                "rom": {"free": m.esp_free_rom, "total": m.esp_total_rom},
378‚Üí                "cpu": m.esp_cpu_freq,
379‚Üí                "wifi": {"ssid": m.esp_wifi_ssid, "rssi": m.esp_wifi_rssi}
380‚Üí            }
381‚Üí        })
382‚Üí    return results
